title: Lunar's Miniature Weapons
description: Resizes Weapons To Make Them Small!
body:
# Why I Made This

I feel as if the weapons block so much of your view, it's hard to see, so I made this pack!

# What Does This Pack Do?

This Pack Will Make Axes and Swords smaller without making them lose quality.

# My Socials

Discord: https://discord.gg/txhRenN2KH

Youtube: https://youtube.com/c/@LunarsVoid
